# Personal Website

> Developer, builder, and writer.

This is the personal website of [Your Name]. It contains writing, projects, and a way to connect.

## Pages

- [Home](/) — Introduction and featured writing
- [Blog](/blog) — Articles on building, technology, and ideas
- [Projects](/projects) — Products and tools I've built
- [Chat](/chat) — Ask an AI trained on my writing

## Writing

The blog covers topics including software development, product building, and technology thinking.
All articles are available in English and Chinese.

## Projects

A curated list of web products and tools built by the author.
Projects include live products, open-source tools, and experiments.

## Contact

Reach out via email or social links available on the homepage.
